description: Atlas UI component registry — NinjaCat's source-of-truth design system

components.name: Button
components.description: Primary action trigger. Use for all clickable actions.

props.name: variant
props.description: Visual weight. solid=primary CTA, outlined=secondary, ghost=tertiary.

props.name: loading
props.description: Shows spinner, disables interaction, sets aria-busy.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Native disabled — removes from tab order.

doPatterns: Use solid/primary for the single main CTA on a page or form
Use outlined/secondary for cancel or back actions next to a primary
Use ghost/secondary for tertiary or destructive-confirmation cancel actions
Use size=sm inside table rows or compact layouts
dontPatterns: Don't use danger color unless the action permanently destroys data
Don't place two solid/primary buttons side by side
Don't use ghost for primary actions — it reads as inactive

components.name: Input
components.description: Text input field for single-line user data entry.

props.name: label
props.description: Label text rendered above the input.

props.name: hint
props.description: Helper text rendered below when no error is present.

props.name: error
props.description: Error message — renders below input, sets aria-invalid, styles red border.

props.name: leadingIcon
props.description: Icon rendered inside the input on the left.

props.name: trailingIcon
props.description: Icon rendered inside the input on the right.

doPatterns: Always provide a label — placeholder alone is not accessible
Use error prop instead of rendering your own error message below
Use hint for constraints like character limits or format guidance
dontPatterns: Don't show both error and hint at the same time — error replaces hint
Don't use leadingIcon and trailingIcon together without testing at sm screens

components.name: Textarea
components.description: Multi-line text input for longer user content.
doPatterns: Use for descriptions, notes, or any content requiring more than one line
Set rows to reflect expected content length
dontPatterns: Don't use Textarea for single-line inputs — use Input instead

components.name: Select
components.description: Native dropdown for choosing from a fixed list of options.

props.name: options
props.description: Array of { value, label, disabled? } objects.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Disabled first option shown when no value is selected.

doPatterns: Use when the list of options is fixed and known at build time
Provide a placeholder for optional fields
dontPatterns: Don't use for more than ~15 options — consider a searchable dropdown instead
Don't use for boolean yes/no — use a Checkbox or Switch

components.name: Checkbox
components.description: Boolean toggle for opt-in/opt-out choices within forms.

props.name: label
props.description: Clickable label text next to the checkbox.

props.name: description
props.description: Secondary descriptive text below the label.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called with the new boolean value when changed.

doPatterns: Use for opt-in agreements, feature toggles in a list, or multi-select filter groups
Use description for clarifying text below the label
dontPatterns: Don't use Checkbox for a single on/off setting — use Switch instead
Don't use Checkbox for mutually exclusive choices — use Select or radio buttons

components.name: Switch
components.description: Toggle for a single boolean setting that takes immediate effect.

props.name: label
props.description: Clickable label text next to the switch.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called with new boolean value on toggle.

doPatterns: Use for immediate-effect settings like 'Enable notifications' or 'Dark mode'
Use description to explain the consequence of toggling
dontPatterns: Don't use Switch inside a form that requires Submit — use Checkbox instead
Don't use Switch for multi-select — use Checkbox group

components.name: Badge
components.description: Small inline label for status, category, or count.

props.name: dot
props.description: Shows a colored dot before the label.

props.name: status
props.description: Adds role='status' for live-region screen reader announcements.

doPatterns: Use variant to convey semantic meaning — success=active/complete, error=failed/blocked
Use dot variant for compact status indicators next to names
dontPatterns: Don't use Badge for counts that update dynamically without setting status={true}
Don't use more than 2 badges on the same row

components.name: Avatar
components.description: Circular user representation — image, initials, or fallback icon.

props.name: src
props.description: Image URL. Falls back to initials or icon on error.

props.name: initials
props.description: 1-2 letter initials shown when no image is available.

props.name: alt
props.description: REQUIRED for accessibility — used as aria-label when no image is shown.

doPatterns: Always provide alt with the person's name
Provide initials as fallback when image may not load
dontPatterns: Don't use Avatar for non-person imagery — use an icon or image instead
Don't omit alt — it breaks screen reader support for initials/fallback states

components.name: Card
components.description: Surface container for grouping related content. Compose with CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardFooter.

props.name: padding
props.description: Inner padding. none=0, sm=12px, md=20px, lg=32px.

props.name: border
props.description: Shows a subtle border around the card.

doPatterns: Use Card to wrap forms, settings sections, or content panels
Use CardHeader + CardTitle + CardDescription for consistent heading structure
Use CardFooter for action buttons at the bottom
dontPatterns: Don't nest Cards more than 1 level deep
Don't use elevation > 2 for inline content — reserve high elevation for modals/popovers
